title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 544.090 - Warrants, where executed
text:
544.090.  Warrants, where executed. — Warrants issued by those persons vested by Section 1 of Article V of the Constitution of Missouri with the judicial power of the state may be executed in any part of this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 3859, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634, A.L. 1993 S.B. 180) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3469; 1919 § 3814; 1909 § 5022
